content:
# Mud Weight

**Summary**: The weight of the drilling fluid used to balance formation pressure.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] used mud-weight as a proxy for pore pressure in training the SVM model.

## Scientific Context

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] Directly related to the estimated pore pressure in the formation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] Measured at well sites and used as a training label for machine learning.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Mud-weight was increased to over 100 ppcf to control well conditions in high-pressure zones. ([[2013-mark|Mark, 2013, p. 94]])
